zh.Hungerford, Berkshire, England: 英國英格蘭波克夏格福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Fettiplace於1335年出生在英國波克夏時，他的父親Thomas Fettiplace30歲，母親Mary Charney26歲。他於1385年與Beatrice Archfield Blackmore在英國英格蘭波克夏丹華斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1411年6月在英國英格蘭波克夏格福德享年76歲。

zh-hans.Great Shefford, Berkshire, England: 英国波克夏格亞特 雪福德
zh-hans.Hungerford, Berkshire, England: 英国英格兰波克夏格福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Fettiplace于1335年出生在英国波克夏时，他的父亲Thomas Fettiplace30岁，母亲Mary Charney26岁。他于1385年与Beatrice Archfield Blackmore在英国英格兰波克夏丹華斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1411年6月在英国英格兰波克夏格福德享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fettiplace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: nickname from the Anglo-Norman French phrase fete place ‘make room’, perhaps for an usher.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Fettiplace was born in 1335, in Berkshire, England, his father, Thomas Fettiplace, was 30 and his mother, Mary Charney, was 26. He married Beatrice Archfield Blackmore in 1385, in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in June 1411, in Hungerford, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Fettiplace est né en 1335, à Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Fettiplace, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mary Charney, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice Archfield Blackmore en 1385, à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en juin 1411, à Hungerford, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Fettiplace 1335 in Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Fettiplace 30 und seine Mutter Mary Charney 26. Er hat 1385 in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Beatrice Archfield Blackmore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Juni 1411 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Hungerford, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Fettiplace è nato il nel 1335 nel Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Fettiplace, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mary Charney, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice Archfield Blackmore nel 1385, nel Denchworth, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1411, nel Hungerford, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Fettiplaceが1335年にイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Fettiplaceは30歳，母Mary Charneyは26歳であった。1385年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアデンチウオルスでBeatrice Archfield Blackmoreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1411年6月にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアハンジャーフォードで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Fettiplace(이)가 1335년 영국 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Fettiplace(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Charney(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 덴ch워스에서 Beatrice Archfield Blackmore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1411년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 헌그르퍼드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Fettiplace nasceu em 1335, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Fettiplace, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mary Charney, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Archfield Blackmore em 1385, em Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em junho de 1411, em Hungerford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Fettiplace родился в 1335 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Fettiplace было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Charney, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Archfield Blackmore в 1385 г. в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер июнь 1411 г. в местности хунгирфорд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Fettiplace nació en 1335, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Fettiplace, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mary Charney, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Beatrice Archfield Blackmore en 1385, en Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en junio de 1411, en Hungerford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
